groupings.title: Core API
groupings.description: Start with OAuth-first MCP, API-key REST auth, SDKs, and broad X data workflows.

groupings.title: Tweet Search
groupings.description: Search tweets, analyze engagement, export posts, and inspect replies, quotes, and trends.

groupings.title: User Data
groupings.description: Read user timelines, followers, mutuals, lists, communities, and approved account data.

groupings.title: Monitoring
groupings.description: Track accounts, hashtags, competitors, mentions, webhooks, and trending news with clear approvals.

groupings.title: Publishing
groupings.description: Plan, write, optimize, and publish X posts only after explicit confirmation.

groupings.title: Growth
groupings.description: Run follower, cleanup, and giveaway workflows with bounded calls and explicit confirmation.
